name: Channa Kari (Curried Chick Peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the curry powder and minced garlic. Stir to combine.
3. Add the chopped sweet green pepper and cook for about 2 minutes, until fragrant.
4. Open the cans of chick peas and add them to the skillet with the remaining salt.
5. Stir everything together and bring to a simmer.
6. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10-15 minutes or until the chick peas are heated through.
7. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander or parsley. Serves 6
